title: table name size
text: table name size Sets the maximum size of table names in the database. USYS$ Mnemonic _PARAMS = table name size = Number USYS$ Mnemonic _PARAMS = tblnmsize = Number Arguments Number —maximum number of characters allowed for table names. Use Applies to Mnemonic Connector Syntax Informix connector INF USYS$INF_PARAMS Description Use the table name size option to specify the maximum size, in number of bytes, allowed for table names. When specified, the connector truncates table names to the specified size. The minimum size is 18 bytes and the maximum size is 128 bytes. USYS$Mnemonic_PARAMS = table name size = 32 Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
